name: Only Up 2
short_description: Reach new heights in "Only Up 2," set in a mysterious world above the clouds, brimming with secrets waiting to be unearthed. Embark on an ascent like no other, the only limit is the sky.
detailed_description:
In the captivating and intuitive game "Only Up 2" players are faced with a clear but challenging mission: navigate through the obstacles, maintain your balance, and keep climbing until you reach the very top.

Climb out of the favellas and secure the highgrounds in the biggest map and journey you've ever seen before!


Features
  • Biggest map yet
  • Speedrunning features
  • Steam Leaderboards
  • New Multiplayer System

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Traditional Chinese*, German*
*languages with full audio support
